$schema_note: v0.5.0 publication receipt. Machine-readable record of the public publication state. NO tokens, NO secrets, NO credentials. Supersedes the v0.4.3 receipt (that publication's record remains in RELEASE_NOTES.md and in git history).

zenodo.concept_doi_note: The concept DOI always resolves to the latest published version; v0.5.0 was deposited via the new-version path on the v0.4.3 record (20279919), which remains published and untouched.
zenodo.title: jam-actions-v0 (public subset) — AI Jam Sessions tool-use traces

huggingface.note: Updated to v0.5.0 in the same workflow run as the Zenodo deposition. Correction to the historical record: the v0.4.3 receipt recorded HF as 'deferred' (token scope), but the mirror was subsequently pushed and was live at v0.4.3 before this update — the deferred status was stale.

release_gate_cli.input_baseline: sealed slice21 baseline restored from git history at publish pre-flight (sha256 5bb5b2244b0bb03dc38a9235804ac71468084e3881ead6c823a79197d25b8e23; measured on v0.4.3 records — scope disclosed in RELEASE_NOTES.md)

execution_verification.note: Standing packaging gate (erratum-001). Runs at cut time on a rig with an audio device; the publish pre-flight asserts the shipped receipt, whose record bytes are pinned by checksums.
